entity: Klay Thompson 52 PTS (37 in the 3rd quarter) vs Sacramento Kings on 2015-01-23 (GSW 126-101; the 37-point quarter is the NBA record for points in a single quarter)

query_target.sql: SELECT player_name, team_abbreviation, game_date, pts, min, fgm, fga, fg3m, fg3a FROM fact_player_game_log WHERE player_name = 'Klay Thompson' AND game_date = '2015-01-23' AND pts = 52

notes: fact_player_game_log only stores per-game totals, not per-quarter splits; the 37-point quarter is a sub-game stat. The fixture pins the game total (52 PTS) on the date BBR records it, with fg3m=11 / fg3a=15 as a discriminator (Klay's 11 3PM on 15 attempts is the in-game signature of the 3rd-quarter explosion).
